name: Eastover Park Pickleball Courts
description: Eastover Park Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Eastover, NC. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms.

name: Gates Four Golf & Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Gates Four Golf & Country Club in Fayetteville, NC! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: G.B. Myers Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at G.B. Myers Recreation Center in Fayetteville, NC! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Hope Mills Recreation Center
description: Hope Mills Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hope Mills, NC. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Massey Hill Recreation Center
description: Massey Hill Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Fayetteville, NC. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Rowan Park
description: Rowan Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fayetteville, NC. There are 8 outdoor concrete and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
